title: Add section-aware Meshtastic config sync vector assertions
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.2 updates meshtastic_app_compat vectors to show repeated FromRadio.config records, but the JSON sequence only records repeated config values and does not name the nine config sections or assert each section payload. What needs to be done: extend the vector generator/schema/tests so stage 69420 and legacy/full-sync vectors identify the section order (device, position, power, network, display, lora, bluetooth, security, device_ui) and validate representative payload fields for each section. Acceptance criteria: generated vectors fail if a section is missing, reordered, or encoded with the wrong oneof/payload fields; Zephyr and Python vector checks pass.
